author: @GlowWithPriya
text: 3 weeks on @MosaicWellness Glow Serum and I genuinely cannot believe the difference in my skin. The dark spots from last year's sun damage are FADING. No irritation, no breakouts. Just results. This is my new forever serum 🌟 #MosaicWellness #GlowSerum #IndianSkincare

author: @HairCareHarini
text: Okay @MosaicWellness Hair Growth Oil is not a gimmick. 6 weeks in and I can see actual baby hairs on my temples that haven't been there in YEARS. My hair loss started after stress last year and this oil is genuinely helping. Consistent use + oil massage = results! #HairGrowth

author: @SkincareNerdMumbai
text: The @MosaicWellness SPF50 sunscreen literally doesn't leave a white cast on my NC42 skin. I've been searching for this for 5 years. FIVE YEARS. And it doesn't pill under makeup. How is this brand not talked about more? Highly recommend for brown skin queens 👑 #IndianSkincare

author: @WellnessVibesDelhi
text: @MosaicWellness Immunity Boost Powder has been my morning ritual for 2 months. Family of 4, we've all been healthier this winter season. The taste is genuinely pleasant. Great product! #Wellness #ImmunityBoost

author: @BiotinWarning_Ananya
text: PSA: @MosaicWellness Biotin Gummies gave me the worst cystic acne of my life. I'm 27, haven't had a breakout in years. 3 weeks on biotin = jawline covered in painful cysts. Stopped 2 weeks ago, slowly clearing. The biotin-acne link is real and MosaicWellness NEEDS to add this warning. RT to spread awareness! #BiotinBreakout

author: @CollagenQueenBangalore
text: My 46-year-old mother has been using @MosaicWellness Collagen Night Cream for 3 months. The difference is SO visible - her skin is plumper, fine lines are softer, and she glows. She was skeptical at first but now she's converted. Best gift I could have given her! ❤️

author: @ProductAuthenticity_Watch
text: Thread: Possible fake @MosaicWellness Glow Serum circulating on Amazon 🧵 My bottle arrived and something is OFF. Different color, different smell, QR code positioned differently. I've bought this product 4 times and this bottle is not the same. Has anyone else noticed this? 1/

author: @ProductAuthenticity_Watch
text: 2/ The QR code on the box: My previous genuine bottles had the QR code in the bottom right corner of the back panel. This new bottle has it slightly higher and the code itself looks slightly blurry when scanned. Also the batch number format is different. See photos attached. 2/

author: @ProductAuthenticity_Watch
text: 3/ I'm reaching out to @MosaicWellness for an official response. This might be counterfeit products or a quality control issue. Either way it needs addressing ASAP. If you've bought MosaicWellness Glow Serum recently, CHECK your product carefully. 3/3 #FakeProducts #MosaicWellness

author: @VitaminCWarrior_Hyderabad
text: 2 months with @MosaicWellness Vitamin C Face Wash! Skin is SO much brighter. My colleagues are asking if I'm doing something different - YES, just washing my face with this magical wash! 😂 Best budget brightening product in India rn. #SkincareTips #VitaminC

author: @SkinCareMom_Chennai
text: @MosaicWellness I bought your Sunscreen SPF50 and it broke me out. I have acne-prone skin and your product page says 'suitable for all skin types'. This is incorrect. Please update your product descriptions to specify skin types. I've wasted Rs 849. #ConsumerRights

author: @NightSkincareFan
text: The @MosaicWellness Collagen Night Cream is worth every single rupee. I'm 43 and started 2 months ago - I genuinely look younger. My aesthetician asked what I'm using because my skin texture has improved so much. This cream has my permanent loyalty! ✨ #AntiAging

author: @ISA_Member_Kolkata
text: The fake @MosaicWellness product thread on Reddit ISA has 900+ upvotes now. This is a serious issue that the brand needs to address PUBLICLY. Not just a DM to the original poster but an official statement. Where is @MosaicWellness in all of this? #IndianSkincare

author: @HairRevival_Journey
text: Month 3 update on @MosaicWellness Hair Growth Oil! My hair fall is SO much less - I used to find hair everywhere. Now barely any. New growth visible! I do warm oil massage twice a week religiously. This oil is genuinely effective for hair loss. Sharing my before/after in thread!

author: @BiotinBreakout_Deepika
text: Replying to @BiotinWarning_Ananya - I'm the THIRD person confirming @MosaicWellness Biotin Gummies caused my cystic acne. Started 5 weeks ago, acne started week 3, I've stopped now. My dermatologist confirmed biotin as the culprit. RT this warning! #BiontinBreakout #MosaicWellness

author: @GlowObsessed_Delhi
text: My dermatologist recommended @MosaicWellness Glow Serum for my melasma and 10 weeks later I'm SO glad I took that advice. The melasma on my cheeks is visibly fading. Combined with their SPF50 sunscreen = powerful combination. Dr. Sharma in GK2 Delhi is a fan! #Melasma #Skincare

author: @WinterSkinSOS_Pune
text: Ab toh @MosaicWellness Collagen Night Cream ke bina winter possible nahi hai mere liye! Pehle bohot dry skin thi, raat ko lagata tha toh subah skin itni smooth hoti thi. Magical product hai yeh! Sab ko try karna chahiye. ❄️✨ #WinterSkincare #CollagenCream

author: @DeliveryFail_Tracker
text: Is anyone else's @MosaicWellness order via Delhivery stuck? Mine has been 'Out for Delivery' for 4 days now. Called Delhivery - they said 'tomorrow' every day. Called MosaicWellness customer care - 30 min wait then disconnected. This is becoming a pattern. Order: OD-2024-567788

author: @SPFEveryday_Mumbai
text: @MosaicWellness SPF50 meri zindagi change kar di! Pehle tan se pareshan thi, ab nahi. No white cast, no stickiness. Roz lagati hoon aur meri skin actually lighter ho rahi hai sunscreen ki wajah se. Yeh product genuine kamal ka hai. #SunscreenEveryday #MosaicWellness

author: @SkincareReport_India
text: THREAD: Tracking the @MosaicWellness Glow Serum authenticity issue 🧵 It's been 2.5 weeks since the first Reddit post about potentially fake products. Lab test confirmed ingredient concentrations are wrong. FSSAI complaint filed. Still NO official response from @MosaicWellness. 1/

author: @SkincareReport_India
text: 2/ The timeline: Jan 7 - First reports of suspicious Glow Serum. Jan 10 - Reddit post goes viral (900+ upvotes). Jan 18 - Follow-up post confirms MosaicWellness gave vague response. Jan 26 - Lab test results confirm ingredient mismatch. Zero official @MosaicWellness statement. 2/

author: @SkincareReport_India
text: 3/ Adding to this: Multiple reports of @MosaicWellness delivery failures via @DelhiveryIndia are now coming in. This brand is facing a multi-front crisis: product authenticity + delivery breakdown + silence from management. This is a case study in what NOT to do. 3/3 @MosaicWellness

author: @DeliveryVictim_Nisha
text: @MosaicWellness @DelhiveryIndia WORST delivery experience. My Glow Serum order placed Jan 15, today is Jan 28. Delhivery shows 'Delivered' but I RECEIVED NOTHING. Filed complaint with both, zero resolution. Rs 1,200 gone. Filing consumer complaint now. Order: OD-2024-889922 #ConsumerRights

author: @AngryCustomer_Pranav
text: @MosaicWellness yeh kya tamasha hai? Teesri baar Delhivery ne mera order galat address pe deliver kar diya! Face Wash order tha, kisi random neighbor ke paas gaya! Order: OD-2024-990033. Ab aap log seedha jawab do - delivery partner badlo ya refund do! #MosaicWellnessFail

author: @DeliveryDisaster_Shweta
text: .@MosaicWellness my Immunity Powder arrived with the bag torn and HALF THE POWDER SPILLED inside the box. @DelhiveryIndia clearly threw the package around. This has happened to MULTIPLE people this week. You need to either change your logistics partner or add better protective packaging. UNACCEPTABLE.

author: @MosaicWellnessCrisis_Watcher
text: Day 2 of the @MosaicWellness delivery crisis: Reports flooding in from Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Chennai. At least 50+ customers reporting: packages not delivered, packages damaged, wrong products. @DelhiveryIndia appears to have a major operational failure. Still no response from @MosaicWellness. THREAD 🧵

author: @Sunitha_Chennai_Angry
text: @MosaicWellness 2nd time Delhivery has destroyed my order this month. SPF50 tube cracked, product oozed out. Box was wet. Filed complaint. AGAIN. Your logistics partner is destroying your brand reputation and you do NOTHING. DO BETTER. Order: OD-2024-332255

author: @BrandWatcher_India
text: @MosaicWellness now trending in India Twitter for all wrong reasons. 3 concurrent crises: 1) Fake/adulterated products (lab test confirmed), 2) Delivery disaster via @DelhiveryIndia, 3) Zero PR response. Their share of negative mentions in skincare conversations went from 8% to 61% in 72 hours. This is a textbook brand crisis. #PRDisaster

author: @Rohini_Mumbai_Frustrated
text: @MosaicWellness MERA PACKAGE KAHAN HAI? 15 DAYS HO GAYE! Delhivery ne bola package lost ho gaya. Aap log koi response hi nahi de rahe ho. @DelhiveryIndia bhi koi help nahi kar rahi. Main consumer forum mein complaint karungi! Order: OD-2024-776699 #MosaicWellness #ConsumerComplaints

author: @MediaWatch_Beauty
text: Breaking: @MosaicWellness is trending on Twitter India (5th position) following 3-day delivery crisis affecting 500+ customers and unresolved fake product allegations. Multiple media outlets reaching out for comment. Brand has not responded publicly in 5 days. This is a full-scale reputation crisis. #MosaicWellness

author: @LoyalCustomer_Balance
text: Amidst the @MosaicWellness storm, I want to say: I've used their products for 18 months. The Glow Serum transformed my skin. The SPF50 is my holy grail. The night cream made me look younger. The PRODUCTS are genuinely good. The operational issues need fixing but don't write off the brand yet. They need to respond though - TODAY.
